name: DF.oa
description: DF.oa is a sibling language of Orchestra that is used to compile exclusively to DiamondFire templates.

scripts.gen-grammar: antlr-ng -o src/language/parser/dfoa -Dlanguage=TypeScript grammar/DFOALexer.g4 && antlr-ng -o src/language/parser/dfoa --lib src/language/parser/dfoa -l -v -Dlanguage=TypeScript grammar/DFOA.g4
